description: PR4 scenario #1 — INSTRUCTOR_CLASH emission. Two sections share an instructor string ('Dr. Smith'). Both could take Sun 08:00, but only one will; the loser's decision_trace must record INSTRUCTOR_CLASH for the Sun 08:00 alternative once PR4 commit 3 wires emission. Instructor identity comes from TermSectionMeeting.instructor (opaque string, per A6 — strip+casefold normalisation only, no delimiter splitting).
notes: Commit 1 creates this fixture and the failing test; commit 3 turns it green by wiring INSTRUCTOR_CLASH emission in the candidate-scoring loop.
Instructor strings are treated as opaque (A6). 'Dr. Smith / Dr. Jones' is one id, not two — we do not parse multi-instructor strings in PR4.
